evals.prompt: Create a new Obsidian plugin called 'Note Timer' that tracks time spent on notes
evals.expected_output: Uses create-plugin.js boilerplate generator or creates proper file structure with src/main.ts, manifest.json, package.json, tsconfig.json, esbuild.config.mjs
assertions: manifest.json does not contain 'obsidian' in plugin ID
Plugin name does not end with 'Plugin'
No direct view references stored as class properties

evals.prompt: Fix the ESLint error: 'prefer-register-event' in my Obsidian plugin
evals.expected_output: Wraps event subscription with this.registerEvent() for automatic cleanup on plugin unload
assertions: Original event callback logic is preserved

evals.prompt: My Obsidian plugin icon button has no accessible label
evals.expected_output: Adds aria-label attribute to the button element with descriptive action text
assertions: Label describes the action (not the icon name)

evals.prompt: Prepare my Obsidian plugin for community submission
evals.expected_output: Validates manifest.json naming rules, runs ESLint, checks accessibility, provides submission checklist
assertions: Plugin ID checked for 'obsidian' and 'plugin' suffix
Plugin name checked for 'Obsidian' word and 'Plugin' suffix
Description checked for proper termination and forbidden phrases

evals.prompt: Style my Obsidian plugin modal to match the current theme
evals.expected_output: Uses Obsidian CSS variables instead of hardcoded colors, scoped to plugin class
assertions: var(--background-primary) or similar CSS variables used
CSS selectors scoped to plugin-specific class
